emails.subject: Re: Are you there?
emails.body: Re: Are you there? Yes, I'm here finally. What a fiasco! I got here yesterday morning and no phone, computer or boxes. Karen, my assistant had put in all the work requests, and Robin had come right behind her and cancelled them. Go figure! Anyway, Robin was out yesterday and today, so Karen had to start getting everything in place for me. I got my computer at 5:00 and my phone right before lunch today. I started to call Mark and ask if I could come back. I guess eventually, it will all work out. Let's do lunch! Marie Tana Jones 04/24/00 05:28 PM

emails.subject: Re: Are you there?
emails.body: Re: Are you there? I needed to whine with you yesterday about my favorite nat gas trader and couldn't get hold of you...and then my favorite lazy paralegal already passed on some of her work to me!
